memberdef.argsstring: (void *IicPtr, u16 SlaveAddr, u8 *MsgPtr, unsigned ByteCount, u8 Option)
memberdef.name: Si570_I2cSend

briefdescription.para: This function send the IIC data to Si570.

parameterdescription.para: contains the 7 bit IIC address of the device to send the specified data to.
points to the data to be sent.
is the number of bytes to be sent.
indicates whether to hold or free the bus after transmitting the data.

memberdef.argsstring: (void *IicPtr, u16 SlaveAddr, u8 *BufPtr, unsigned ByteCount, u8 Option)
memberdef.name: Si570_I2cRecv

briefdescription.para: This function send the IIC data to Si570.

parameterdescription.para: contains the 7 bit IIC address of the device to send the specified data to.
points to the memory to write the data.
is the number of bytes to be sent.
indicates whether to hold or free the bus after transmitting the data.

briefdescription.para: This function the frequency output of Si570.

parameterdescription.para: contains the 7 bit IIC address of the device to send the specified data to.
is the requested frequency output in MHz (floating)

memberdef.argsstring: (double Freq, u8 *RFreq_Cal, u8 *RFreq_Set, u8 *HSDIV_Set, u8 *N1_Set, double *XtalFreq)
memberdef.name: Dp21RxSs_Pt_Si570_RfreqCalc

memberdef.argsstring: (void *IicPtr, u8 Addr, u8 *RFreq_Set, u8 HSDIV_Set, u8 N1_Set)
memberdef.name: Dp21RxSs_Pt_Si570_WriteRfreq
